title: Fizz Buzz
description:
Given an integer `n`, return a string array `answer` (1-indexed) where for
each `i` from 1 to `n`: `"FizzBuzz"` if `i` is divisible by 3 and 5, `"Fizz"`
if divisible by 3, `"Buzz"` if divisible by 5, otherwise the number as a
string.

solutions.summary: Walk 1..n and pick the right label by divisibility.

steps.title: Start from the function shape
steps.explanation: Begin with the signature and a default empty list.

steps.title: Collect into a result list
steps.explanation: Build the answer in a list and return it.

steps.title: Loop from 1 to n
steps.explanation: Visit every number in the inclusive range.

steps.title: Handle the FizzBuzz / number cases
steps.explanation: Multiples of both 3 and 5 are `"FizzBuzz"`; everything else is the number for now.

steps.title: Add the Fizz and Buzz cases
steps.explanation: Insert the divisible-by-3 and divisible-by-5 checks before the number fallback.
